// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService>(KeyHolder.Key);
        services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyedService, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService>(KeyHolder.Key);
        services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2>(KeyHolder.Key);
        services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyedService, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2>(KeyHolder.Key);

        return services;
    }
}
